ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Pitcher, Catcher, Outfielder) */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Draft round number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Draft year of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in (e.g., AAA, AA, A) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in (e.g., East, West) */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "gm" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team's score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team's score */,
  "game_length" TEXT /* Length of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "gs" INTEGER /* Games started by the player */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Wins by the player */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Losses by the player */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned Run Average of the player */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks and Hits per Inning Pitched by the player */,
  "sv" INTEGER /* Saves by the player */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Strikeouts by the player */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Base on Balls (Walks) by the player */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits allowed by the player */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs allowed by the player */,
  "er" INTEGER /* Earned Runs allowed by the player */,
  "cg" INTEGER /* Complete Games by the player */,
  "sho" INTEGER /* Shutouts by the player */,
  "ab" INTEGER /* At Bats by the player */,
  "hbp" INTEGER /* Hit By Pitch by the player */,
  "sf" INTEGER /* Sacrifice Flies by the player */,
  "tb" INTEGER /* Total Bases by the player */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs Batted In by the player */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting Average of the player */,
  "obp" REAL /* On-Base Percentage of the player */,
  "slg" REAL /* Slugging Percentage of the player */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-Base Plus Slugging of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "gs" INTEGER /* Games started by the player */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Wins by the player */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Losses by the player */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned Run Average of the player */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks and Hits per Inning Pitched by the player */,
  "sv" INTEGER /* Saves by the player */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Strikeouts by the player */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Base on Balls (Walks) by the player */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits allowed by the player */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs allowed by the player */,
  "er" INTEGER /* Earned Runs allowed by the player */,
  "cg" INTEGER /* Complete Games by the player */,
  "sho" INTEGER /* Shutouts by the player */,
  "ab" INTEGER /* At Bats by the player */,
  "hbp" INTEGER /* Hit By Pitch by the player */,
  "sf" INTEGER /* Sacrifice Flies by the player */,
  "tb" INTEGER /* Total Bases by the player */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs Batted In by the player */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting Average of the player */,
  "obp" REAL /* On-Base Percentage of the player */,
  "slg" REAL /* Slugging Percentage of the player */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-Base Plus Slugging of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the award was won in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team played in */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team played in */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the division */,
  "league_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the league */,
  "playoff_appearance" TEXT /* Whether the team made a playoff appearance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "uniform_number" INTEGER /* Uniform number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_box_scores" (
  "box_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box score */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the team */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the team */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors by the team */,
  "LOB" INTEGER /* Number of runners Left On Base by the team */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_box_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_box_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that plays in the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of the stadium's surface (e.g., Grass, Turf) */,
  "surface_material" TEXT /* Material of the stadium's surface (e.g., Kentucky Bluegrass, FieldTurf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the umpire */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the umpire */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "crew_chief" INTEGER /* Whether the umpire is a crew chief */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_umpires" (
  "game_umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game umpire */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the umpire (e.g., Home Plate, First Base) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_umpires_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_umpires_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury (e.g., Sprain, Strain) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., Trade, Signing) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
